name: Potato Fans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small saucepan, melt together the butter, minced garlic, and chopped parsley over low heat until combined.
3. Peel each potato and cut each potato crosswise into thin slices (about 1/4 inch) without slicing all the way through the potato.
4. Place the sliced potatoes in a baking dish and drizzle with the melted butter mixture.
5. Bake for 1 hour or until golden brown, crispy, and the potatoes have fanned out.
6. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 servings
